fixture_model: Each vector contains complete AuditRun and AuditPass schema instances plus application-only relationship context. Schema validation precedes exactly one named application rule.

vectors.single_fault: no Standard pass; PASS-003 is not evaluated until PASS-001 succeeds
Standard is not first; declared prerequisite lists are otherwise valid
one execution privilege differs from Standard pass
one execution privilege differs from Elevated pass
RebootContinuation has no Reboot or DefenderOffline receipt
Administrative receipt is bound to Standard instead of Elevated pass
one prerequisite ID is absent from the run
two schema-valid pass objects share one pass_id
